# Henselmans Caliper Body Fat Percentage Calculator.xlsx

## Sheet: BF% Calculator

|  | Women | Men |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Phenotype is black (1 = yes, 0 = no) | 0 | 1 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Age | 31 | 30 |  | Click here for the skinfold location instructions. |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Chest skinfold (mm) | NA | 3 |  | Click here for the caliper usage instructions. |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Subscapular skinfold (mm) | NA | 11 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Mid-axillary skinfold (mm) | NA | 5 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Suprailiac skinfold (mm) | 5 | 4.7 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Umbilical skinfold (mm) | 7 | 10.1 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Thigh skinfold (mm) | 21 | 15.2 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Triceps skinfold (mm) | 11 | 7 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Body fat percentage | 16.8453 | 9.5565 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Computations by Menno Henselmans based on the gender specific Jackson et al., |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| the CE-corrected Evans C3, Brozek et al., Evans E3 and Oliver et al. model 3. |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
